allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const d=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('dist/Navigator_Base_v2.0.txt','utf8'\)\); const h=d.handlers.find\(h=>h.filter.slotKey==='-5'\); const lines=h.code.split\('\\n'\); console.log\('Total lines:', lines.length\); lines.slice\(498,512\).forEach\(\(l,i\)=>console.log\(499+i+':', l\)\);")
Bash(sed -i 's/v2\\.0\\.0/v2.1.0/g; s/v2\\.0 ►/v2.1 ►/g; s/NAVIGATOR v2\\.0  CHAT/NAVIGATOR v2.1  CHAT/g; s/SCREEN VERSION v2\\.0\\.0/SCREEN VERSION v2.1.0/g' src/ship_screen.lua)
Bash(sed -i 's/v2\\.0\\.0/v2.1.0/g; s/NAVIGATOR v2\\.0/NAVIGATOR v2.1/g; s/NO SCREEN VERSION v2\\.0\\.0/NO SCREEN VERSION v2.1.0/g' src/ship_noscreen.lua)
